description: Deterministic recall fixture for P1-A Task 4. Queries and corpus are frozen for cross-commit comparison.

corpus.title: ADR-0001 Identity Boundary
corpus.text: Authentication boundary resolves AuthUser with ownerId identityId identityType and permissions. Tenant context organizationId workspaceId is resolved after authentication and before permission evaluation.

corpus.title: P0-B Release Record
corpus.text: P0-B Engineering Governance is RELEASED with frozen baseline. Merge commit 9b5666a and release tag engineering-governance-p0-b-complete at dc2fa5e are verified on origin.

corpus.title: P0 Baseline Change Policy
corpus.text: P0 baseline is frozen after release. Allowed changes are critical bug fix, security patch, compatibility patch, or governance milestone through ADR. Feature development belongs to P1 and above.

corpus.title: P1 Success Question
corpus.text: P1 success question is whether the platform is useful for daily work. Org Memory Dogfood validates real organization, real data, measurable recall and evidence linkage.

queries.query: What is the canonical order between authentication tenant context and permission evaluation?
Which merge commit and release tag prove P0-B Engineering Governance is released on origin?
What changes are allowed on frozen P0 baseline and why is feature work moved to P1?
